title: RenderConfig
description: Optional rendering options for the reference API (render_tree_table_with_config). Shared across Rust (serde), C FFI (config_json), WASM, TypeScript (@spannerplan/core), and Python bindings. All fields optional; omitted fields use Rust defaults.

wrapWidth.description: Maximum total rendered line width including tree prefix. 0 disables wrapping; negative values are rejected.

hangingIndent.description: Hang wrapped continuation lines after node-local prefixes (e.g. [Input]) instead of tree-aligned indentation.

printSections.description: Appendix sections after the table. Omit or null for default (predicates only); [] prints no appendix.

showScalarVars.description: Print scalar assignment variable names in semantic appendix sections.

resolveScalarVars.description: Replace direct scalar variable aliases in semantic appendix sections.

resolveScalarVarsRecursive.description: Recursively resolve scalar variable alias chains in appendix sections.

disallowUnknownStats.description: Fail when execution_stats contains unknown keys (Go --disallow-unknown-stats).
